message:
feat: add new connector scaffolds for search, LLM, and media APIs

Register new connector crates in workspace and add FCP2 scaffolding with
manifests, sandbox profiles, and implementation stubs:

Search/Research: brave-search, exa, firecrawl, perplexity-search, tavily
LLM/Inference: huggingface, mistral, openrouter
Media/Audio: deepgram, elevenlabs
Communication: zalo, zalouser, tlon

Each connector includes stateless operation definitions, zone models,
network constraints, and authentication configuration placeholders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ members = [
     "connectors/aws",
     "connectors/discord",
     "connectors/openai",
+    "connectors/openrouter",
     "connectors/telegram",
     "connectors/twitter",
     "connectors/vectordb",
@@ -167,6 +168,18 @@ members = [
     "connectors/twitch",
     "connectors/line",
     "connectors/feishu",
+    "connectors/mistral",
+    "connectors/huggingface",
+    "connectors/brave-search",
+    "connectors/perplexity-search",
+    "connectors/firecrawl",
+    "connectors/exa",
+    "connectors/tavily",
+    "connectors/deepgram",
+    "connectors/elevenlabs",
+    "connectors/zalo",
+    "connectors/zalouser",
+    "connectors/tlon",
 ]
 
 # Default to the FCP2 platform core crates (connectors are explicitly targeted).

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-brave-search"
+description = "Brave Search API connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_brave_search"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-brave-search"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+serde.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:brave-search-first-slice"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.brave-search"
+name = "Brave Search"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Brave Search web query connector"
+archetypes = ["request-response"]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "First slice: web search only."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:public"
+allowed_sources = ["z:public", "z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:public", "z:work"]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.egress", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["network.listen", "system.exec"]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+pub mod connector;
+
+pub use connector::BraveSearchConnector;
+

@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:openrouter-first-slice"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.openrouter"
+name = "OpenRouter"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "OpenRouter request-response connector for non-streaming chat completions and model discovery"
+archetypes = ["request-response"]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores no durable state. Configuration is limited to api_key or credential_id, optional HTTP-Referer/X-Title metadata, base_url, and request_timeout_ms."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+forbidden = ["z:public"]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.egress", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "network.listen"]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+
+[provides.operations."openrouter.chat.completions"]
+description = "Create a non-streaming OpenRouter chat completion using the OpenAI-compatible chat completions API."
+capability = "openrouter.chat"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "none"
+input_schema = { type = "object", required = ["messages"], properties = { model = { type = "string", default = "openai/gpt-4.1-mini" }, messages = { type = "array", minItems = 1 }, max_tokens = { type = "integer", minimum = 1 }, temperature = { type = "number", minimum = 0, maximum = 2 }, top_p = { type = "number", minimum = 0, maximum = 1 }, response_format = { type = "object" }, tools = { type = "array" }, tool_choice = {} } }
+output_schema = { type = "object" }
+network_constraints = { host_allow = ["openrouter.ai"], port_allow = [443], ip_allow = [], cidr_deny = [], require_sni = true, spki_pins = [], deny_localhost = true, deny_private_ranges = true, deny_tailnet_ranges = true, deny_ip_literals = true, require_host_canonicalization = true, dns_max_ips = 16, max_redirects = 3, connect_timeout_ms = 10000, total_timeout_ms = 60000, max_response_bytes = 10485760 }
+
+[provides.operations."openrouter.chat.completions".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use for routed model access through OpenRouter when you need one OpenAI-compatible chat request surface."
+common_mistakes = ["Expecting server-sent streaming in this first slice. The connector only exposes bounded non-streaming completions right now.", "Forgetting to pass a provider-qualified model such as openai/gpt-4.1-mini or anthropic/claude-sonnet-4."]
+examples = ['{"model":"openai/gpt-4.1-mini","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Summarize the FCP security model in 3 bullets."}]}']
+related = ["openrouter.models.list"]
+
+[provides.operations."openrouter.models.list"]
+description = "List currently available OpenRouter models."
+capability = "openrouter.models"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+input_schema = { type = "object", properties = {} }
+output_schema = { type = "object" }
+network_constraints = { host_allow = ["openrouter.ai"], port_allow = [443], ip_allow = [], cidr_deny = [], require_sni = true, spki_pins = [], deny_localhost = true, deny_private_ranges = true, deny_tailnet_ranges = true, deny_ip_literals = true, require_host_canonicalization = true, dns_max_ips = 16, max_redirects = 3, connect_timeout_ms = 10000, total_timeout_ms = 30000, max_response_bytes = 10485760 }
+
+[provides.operations."openrouter.models.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use to discover provider-qualified model IDs before sending a routed completion."
+common_mistakes = ["Assuming OpenRouter model IDs are the same as first-party provider IDs without the provider prefix."]
+examples = ["{}"]
+related = ["openrouter.chat.completions"]

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:tavily-first-slice"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.tavily"
+name = "Tavily"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Tavily connector for search, extract, crawl, and map"
+archetypes = ["request-response"]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "First slice: search, extract, crawl, and map."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.egress", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["network.listen", "system.exec"]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+pub mod connector;
+
+pub use connector::TavilyConnector;
+
